title: SME agenda uses plain item IDs
description:
As a procedure operator, I want SME agenda examples to cite item IDs as plain text, so that the agenda stays useful when no dashboard item URL is available.

Feature: SME agenda item citations

Scenario: SME agenda examples cite disputed items
Given the optimizer generates SME agenda questions with concrete item examples
When an agenda includes an item identifier
Then the agenda renders the item identifier as plain text
And the agenda does not wrap the item identifier in a Markdown link or URL.

Out of scope: changing the substance, structure, or prioritization of SME questions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Behavior covered by focused optimizer config test: SME agenda generation now instructs plain item IDs and strips Markdown links around item citations after both raw agenda writing and rubric-memory gating.
